h1.visual_description: Not present in sample, but inferred as chapter-level titles based on footer content.

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif, centered between horizontal rules, used for figure captions.
h2.example_text: Figure 17.2. Year-to-year changes in housing prices.

h3.visual_description: Italicized, serif, inline with the start of a paragraph, followed by a period.
h3.example_text: Inflationary, nominal, and real interest rates.

visual_matchers.pattern: Horizontal line spanning the full width of the text block above and below an element.
Bar chart with green (positive) and red (negative) bars, labeled with years at a 45-degree angle.
Line graph with vertical text labels on the x-axis and percentage labels on the y-axis.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Inline LaTeX for variables (e.g., $i$, $r$, $r^*$); block LaTeX for equations (inferred from 'so that:' lead-in).
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Narrative citation style (e.g., 'Recall from your earlier training...').

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Right-aligned footer containing chapter title and page number separated by a pipe (e.g., 'Ch. 17. Land Investments | 385').
